narratives.title: Toad Suck Daze
narratives.about: Toad Suck Daze is a long-running spring festival in downtown Conway, Arkansas, centered on music, food, carnival rides, and family activities along the Arkansas River corridor.
narratives.history: The festival grew from a local river-community celebration into one of central Arkansas's best-known annual gatherings. Dates and programming are set annually by the festival organization.
narratives.originStory: The name references the historic Toad Suck community and river folklore tied to the Arkansas River — confirm details from official festival history pages before citing in campaigns or press.

timeline.label: Festival tradition established in Conway
timeline.note: Verify first official year from Toad Suck Daze historical materials.

interestingFacts: Multi-day downtown festival with concerts, vendors, and kids zones.
Major recurring anchor for Faulkner County's community calendar each spring.

faqs.question: When is Toad Suck Daze?
faqs.answer: Dates vary each year — check the official Toad Suck Daze site or the Arkansas Everywhere calendar listing for the current verified schedule.

faqs.question: Where is Toad Suck Daze held?
faqs.answer: Downtown Conway, Faulkner County, Arkansas. Confirm festival map and parking from official sources each year.

faqs.question: Why is it called Toad Suck Daze?
faqs.answer: The name connects to local river history and the Toad Suck area — see official festival About/FAQ pages for the organization's telling.

narratives.researchNotes: Expand with schedule, parking, attendance, and sponsor sections from official site harvest.

narratives.about: Conway is a regional hub in Faulkner County and home to major institutions, schools, and recurring festivals including Toad Suck Daze.

faqs.answer: Toad Suck Daze is the flagship recurring festival. Browse the Conway community calendar on Arkansas Everywhere for sourced dates.
